name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-23
title: tdd-step.py --spec-no-change-reason value is discarded instead of being recorded
description: tdd-step.py cmd_transition captures --spec-no-change-reason into a local variable (line 309), uses it only to skip the spec-diff gate (line 324), then discards it. No audit record is written to feature.json, no log, no commit. The spec invariant on the gate exists to require a reason but the reason itself is not preserved — defeating the spec's audit intent. The flag is also entirely undocumented in docs/spec/spec.md (only mentioned implicitly via the gate behaviour). Fix: persist the reason to feature.json (e.g., last_spec_no_change_reason field) at transition time, or attach it to commit msg, and document the flag explicitly in spec.
